body.title: CLOSED: Add make_dc_proxy() to agent_datacenter; wire AGENT_DATACENTER_DB_URL
body.result: make_dc_proxy() in agent_datacenter/db.py (self-contained, no TheIgors imports per CLAUDE.md rule). AGENT_DATACENTER_DB_URL wired. 4 new tests pass. commit dc33966.
body.description:
Add a make_dc_proxy() function to agent_datacenter (mirrors Igor's make_home_proxy()) that reads AGENT_DATACENTER_DB_URL. Grep agent_datacenter for any modules currently importing IGOR_HOME_DB_URL or Igor's db_proxy and migrate them to make_dc_proxy(). Decision D-datacenter-own-db-2026-05-05.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/lab/utility_closet/db_proxy.py or similar (make_dc_proxy), any agent_datacenter modules importing from Igor's db_proxy or using IGOR_HOME_DB_URL
**Design rules:** no-sqlite, test-all-paths
**Scope boundary:** IN: make_dc_proxy() function, AGENT_DATACENTER_DB_URL wiring, migration of existing agent_datacenter DB callers. OUT: populating memory palace content.
**Test plan:** set AGENT_DATACENTER_DB_URL in test env; verify make_dc_proxy() connects without IGOR_HOME_DB_URL being set; run agent_datacenter tests.
**Pass condition:** agent_datacenter imports/tests pass with only AGENT_DATACENTER_DB_URL set (no IGOR_HOME_DB_URL in env).
